title: Can dates generated through formula be used in calendar view?
excerpt: It looks like Calendar views do not recognize dates generated in a Formula column though, so I can’t add these dates to a Calendar view. Is this accurate? Or am I missing something? Is there a work around? I have seen ot…

posts.author: Rini (Harini)
posts.cookedHtml: It looks like Calendar views do not recognize dates generated in a Formula column though, so I can’t add these dates to a Calendar view. Is this accurate? Or am I missing something? Is there a work around? I have seen other similar posts recommending using Advanced Formula Booster and General Caster. As an org app, its to easy to an approval to use 3rd party apps within monday.com . I wish Monday had this as one of their feature to help navigate this with ease. any thoughts?
